reasoning: Historically, lower-tier or newly promoted teams like Le Havre have a negligible chance of winning Ligue 1, which is heavily dominated by PSG. Given the massive financial and talent disparity with top clubs, as well as a terrible start to the season, their chances of winning the league are astronomically small, arguably close to 0%.
